tldr: OpenAI unveiled its new GPT-5.6 model suite, including Sol, Terra, and Luna, after news of staggering its release at the US government's request.
President Trump accused Iran of breaching a ceasefire following an attack on a Singapore-flagged ship in the Strait of Hormuz.
The US announced a framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon after talks concluded in Washington, DC.

market.why: Equity markets saw modest gains, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite both closing higher. This occurred despite concerns about AI hardware trades hitting a wall and renewed threats of 100% tariffs by President Trump against countries implementing digital services taxes. The modest increase may have been supported by a bipartisan housing package moving closer to becoming law and a stabilizing effect from the Federal Reserve's tough stance on inflation, which is noted as helping bond yields fall.

yield_10y.why: The 10-year Treasury yield remained unchanged at 4.38%. While there were reports that new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation was helping to lower bond yields, and a Minneapolis Fed President indicated expectations for a rate hike this year, these influences appeared to balance, resulting in a stable yield.

vix.why: The VIX, a measure of market volatility, remained unchanged at 18.89. Despite ongoing geopolitical tensions, including accusations of a ceasefire breach by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz and various economic signals, these factors did not significantly alter investor expectations for market fluctuations.

tech.summary: OpenAI unveiled its new GPT-5.6 model suite, including Sol, Terra, and Luna, after news of staggering its release at the US government's request.
Researchers discovered an antibiotic "megacluster," offering a new strategy in the fight against superbugs.
SpaceX announced plans to launch Starlink mobile service in the United States, aiming to test its ambition as a mass-market phone business.

world.summary: President Trump accused Iran of breaching a ceasefire following an attack on a Singapore-flagged ship in the Strait of Hormuz.
The US announced a framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon after talks concluded in Washington, DC.
DR Congo filed a case against Rwanda at the International Court of Justice, alleging decades of violations since the 1994 Rwanda genocide.
